reasoning: The control SI-4(25) focuses on optimizing network traffic analysis to provide visibility. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network policies and service mesh capabilities that provide insights into network traffic. NetworkPolicies can be used to control and monitor traffic flow between pods, while service meshes like Istio or Linkerd can provide detailed telemetry and traffic analysis. Additionally, Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture network-related activities.
